concepts.title: The Legendre symbol
concepts.blurb: For odd prime p, the symbol (a/p) detects whether a is a square mod p, taking values 1, -1, or 0.

concepts.title: Supplementary laws
concepts.blurb: Explicit formulas for (-1/p) and (2/p) via p mod 4 and p mod 8 reduce many residue checks to parity facts.

concepts.title: Gauss's lemma
concepts.blurb: The sign in (a/p) can be computed by counting how many multiples a,2a,...,(p-1)a/2 land past p/2.

concepts.title: Quadratic reciprocity law
concepts.blurb: For odd primes p,q: (p/q)(q/p)=(-1)^((p-1)(q-1)/4), exchanging residue problems between primes.
